mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Pyonea is a Myanmar-focused B2B marketplace that helps business buyers source products from verified suppliers—faster, with clearer terms, and with better accountability.
mission.paragraph2: Our strategy is built on trust and transparency: verified seller onboarding, accurate listings, clear MOQ and pricing, and policies shown before checkout so buyers know what to expect.
mission.paragraph3: We invest in tools that make wholesale buying simpler—search and filters, RFQs for custom needs, bulk ordering, and order tracking—so businesses can buy with confidence and sellers can grow sustainably.

buyers.title: For Buyers
buyers.point1: Source from verified sellers and visible store profiles
buyers.point2: See MOQ, pricing, and seller policies before confirming
buyers.point3: Use safe payment options (including Cash on Delivery and QR-based payments where available)
buyers.point4: Track orders and get support when something goes wrong
buyers.point5: Use RFQs and bulk tools to buy efficiently at wholesale scale

sellers.title: For Sellers
sellers.point1: Reach business buyers across Myanmar with a trusted storefront
sellers.point2: List products with clear MOQ, pricing, and delivery coverage
sellers.point3: Get orders through direct purchases and buyer RFQs
sellers.point4: Build trust with fast responses, accurate fulfillment, and fair policies
sellers.point5: Grow with tools designed for long‑term wholesale operations

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.paragraph1: To be the most trusted B2B marketplace in Myanmar—where buyers can purchase with confidence and sellers can grow through consistent standards.
vision.paragraph2: We aim to standardize wholesale commerce online: clear product information, reliable fulfillment, and transparent policies that reduce disputes.
vision.paragraph3: As we expand, we’ll keep focusing on verification, buyer protection, and practical tools that improve real business outcomes.

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.subtitle: Key policies for using Pyonea. These summaries are for convenience—please read the full policy pages for details.

seo.description: Pyonea's legal centre: terms of service, privacy policy, return policy, and platform guidelines for buyers and sellers on Myanmar's B2B marketplace.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
By using Pyonea, you agree to these Terms.

1) Accounts & eligibility: You must provide accurate information and keep your account secure. We may suspend accounts used for fraud, abuse, or policy violations.

2) Marketplace role: Pyonea is a platform that connects buyers and independent sellers. Product listings, pricing, fulfillment, and warranties are the seller’s responsibility unless explicitly stated otherwise.

3) Orders & payments: When you place an order you agree to pay the displayed total and follow the seller’s stated policies. Payment methods and processing may vary by seller and may involve third‑party providers.

4) Content & conduct: You may not post illegal, misleading, or infringing content. Harassment, spam, and manipulation of reviews or ratings are not allowed.

5) Changes: We may update these Terms to reflect product, legal, or operational changes. Continued use of Pyonea after updates means you accept the revised Terms.

For questions, contact us using the details below.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
We collect and use information to provide the service—such as creating accounts, processing orders, enabling seller support, and improving the marketplace.

What we collect: account details (name, email/phone), shipping information, order history, and device/usage data.

How we use it: to run the platform, prevent fraud, provide customer support, and communicate service updates.

Sharing: we share limited data with sellers (to fulfill orders) and service providers (payments, delivery, analytics) where necessary. We do not sell personal data.

Security: we use reasonable safeguards, but no system is 100% secure.

You can request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data where applicable.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.content:
Pyonea is a marketplace and return/refund rules can differ by seller.

- Check the seller’s return policy on the product page and at checkout.
- If a return is approved, refunds are typically processed within 7–10 business days after confirmation (timelines may vary by payment method).
- Items generally must be returned in original condition unless the seller’s policy states otherwise.
- Shipping fees may be non‑refundable unless the return is due to seller error or a defective/wrong item.

seller.title: Seller Agreement
seller.content:
Sellers are responsible for: accurate listings, lawful products, clear policies, timely fulfillment, and professional communication.

Sellers must:
- Keep inventory, pricing, and delivery coverage accurate
- Respond to buyer messages and order issues within reasonable time
- Honor the stated return/shipping policies
- Avoid prohibited items and misleading claims

Fees: Pyonea may charge platform fees or commissions according to the published pricing plan.

dispute.title: Dispute Resolution
dispute.content:
If there’s an order issue, buyers and sellers should first try to resolve it through direct communication.

If unresolved, Pyonea may review the case and help mediate based on:
- order information and message history
- the seller’s stated policies
- platform rules and applicable law

We may request additional evidence (photos, invoices, delivery proof) and may take action on accounts that repeatedly violate policies.

seo.description: Learn how returns, exchanges, refunds, seller policies, buyer responsibilities, and dispute support work on Pyonea's Myanmar B2B marketplace.

platformPolicy.title: Platform Policy
platformPolicy.description: Pyonea is a marketplace where independent sellers offer their products. Each seller may have their own return, exchange, and refund policy. By placing an order, you agree to the seller’s policy as displayed on the product page and during checkout.

buyerResponsibility.title: Buyer Responsibility
buyerResponsibility.text: Before making a purchase, you must carefully read and understand the return policy of the seller. The seller’s policy is clearly shown on each product page and summarized at checkout. If you have any questions, please contact the seller directly before placing your order.

platformRole.title: Platform’s Role
platformRole.text: Pyonea facilitates transactions but does not set the return policy for sellers. However, all sellers must comply with the Myanmar Consumer Protection Law (2019) and the platform’s minimum standards outlined below.

minimumRequirements.title: Minimum Platform Requirements
items: A clearly stated return window (e.g., 7 days, 14 days, etc.)
Conditions for returns (e.g., unused, original packaging, tags attached)
Process for initiating a return
Refund method and timeline
Who pays return shipping (seller or buyer)

consumerRights.title: Consumer Protection Law Rights
items: If delivery exceeds 15 days beyond the agreed date, you may cancel and receive a full refund.
You have the right to receive products that match their description and are free from defects.
If a product is defective, you may claim repair, replacement, refund, or compensation.

disputeResolution.title: Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.text: If you cannot resolve a return issue directly with the seller, please contact Pyonea support. We will mediate based on the seller’s stated policy and applicable law. If mediation fails, you may file a complaint with the Myanmar Consumer Protection Commission.

sellerPolicy.title: Seller‑Specific Return Policies
sellerPolicy.description: Each seller may have a unique return policy. You can view the full policy on the product page before adding to cart or during checkout. The seller’s policy will be summarized at checkout, and you must agree to it to complete your purchase.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: How Pyonea collects, uses, and protects your information

seo.description: Read how Pyonea protects buyer, seller, order, payment, delivery, and verification data on Myanmar's B2B wholesale marketplace.

privacyPolicy.intro: Pyonea is a B2B marketplace. We collect only the information we need to run the platform—verify sellers, process orders, support shipping and payments, prevent fraud, and improve the buying and selling experience.

dataCollection.title: 1. Information We Collect
dataCollection.text: Depending on how you use Pyonea (buyer or seller), we may collect:
items: Account information (name, email/phone, password or login credentials)
Shipping and contact details needed to fulfill orders
Business and verification details for sellers (business registration, NRC/owner info, documents you provide during onboarding)
Order and transaction history (orders, payments status, refunds/returns where applicable)
Messages and support requests sent through the platform
Technical and usage data (device, browser, IP address, pages visited) for security and performance

dataUsage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
items: Operate the marketplace (accounts, listings, search, cart, checkout, and order tracking)
Verify seller identity and maintain marketplace trust
Process orders and support payments and confirmations
Enable seller fulfillment and buyer delivery communication
Provide customer support and resolve disputes
Prevent fraud, abuse, and policy violations
Improve features and performance (analytics and debugging)

dataSharing.title: 3. Sharing of Information
dataSharing.text: We do not sell your personal information. We share limited data only when necessary to run the marketplace:
items: Sellers (order items and shipping details so they can fulfill your order)
Payment and service providers (to process payments, confirmations, and fraud checks, where applicable)
Delivery/logistics partners (only the information needed to deliver, where used)
Legal authorities if required by law or to protect users and platform integrity
Business transfers (only if ownership or operations change, with reasonable notice)

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

userRights.title: 5. Your Rights
userRights.text: You can request the following, subject to verification and legal retention requirements:
items: Access your personal data
Request correction of inaccurate data
Request deletion of your data (where legally permitted)
Manage cookie preferences (for analytics) in your browser or consent banner

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.text: We use cookies for essential functionality (like keeping you signed in) and, if you consent, for analytics to understand how the marketplace is used and where we can improve.

changes.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
changes.text: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by email or through a notice on our platform.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.text: If you have questions about this policy or your data, please contact us:
contact.address: Bet 59-60, 19 Street, Aungmyaetharsan Township, Mandalay, Myanmar

seo.title: Seller Guidelines | Pyonea Myanmar B2B Marketplace
seo.description: Everything you need to know to sell successfully on Pyonea: eligibility, product standards, prohibited items, performance requirements, and fees.

hero.title: Seller Guidelines
hero.subtitle: These guidelines explain how to sell successfully on Pyonea: verification, listing quality, MOQ and pricing transparency, delivery coverage, communication standards, and dispute handling. They protect buyers and help high‑quality sellers rank better.

sidebar.support_hours: Our seller support team is available Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Requirements
eligibility.subtitle: You must meet all of the following before applying to sell on Pyonea.
eligibility.req_0: Registered business in Myanmar (LLC, sole proprietorship, or partnership)
eligibility.req_1: Valid National Registration Card (NRC) or company registration certificate
eligibility.req_2: Active Myanmar bank account for payment processing
eligibility.req_3: Valid phone number and email address for account verification
eligibility.req_4: Agreement to Pyonea's Terms of Service and Seller Policy
eligibility.note_text: Pyonea reserves the right to request additional verification documents at any time to maintain marketplace integrity.

products.title: Product Standards
products.subtitle: Maintaining listing quality protects buyers and keeps your store visible in search.
products.do_0: Provide accurate, complete product descriptions in English and Myanmar
products.do_1: Upload high-quality images (minimum 800×800px, white or neutral background)
products.do_2: Set correct minimum order quantities (MOQ) and pricing in MMK
products.do_3: Keep inventory levels updated to avoid overselling
products.do_4: List products in the correct category for discoverability
products.do_5: Respond to buyer product inquiries within 24 hours
products.dont_0: Misrepresent product quality, dimensions, or specifications
products.dont_1: Use stock photos that don't accurately represent your product
products.dont_2: List counterfeit, replica, or unauthorized branded goods
products.dont_3: Set deceptive pricing (artificially inflated before discounts)
products.dont_4: Post duplicate listings for the same product
products.dont_5: Use another seller's images without permission

pricing.title: Pricing & Fees
pricing.subtitle: No hidden charges. Commission is only collected on completed transactions.
pricing.footnote: * All prices in MMK. Commission is calculated on the final transaction value excluding shipping costs.
pricing.payment_policy_text: Pyonea releases seller payouts every Monday for the previous week's completed orders, minus commission and any outstanding dispute holds.

shipping.title: Shipping Requirements
shipping.subtitle: Reliable fulfilment is one of the most important factors in your seller rating.
shipping.rule_0: Ship within the committed handling time stated in your listing (default: 3 business days)
shipping.rule_1: Provide a valid tracking number for all shipments above 50,000 MMK
shipping.rule_2: Package items securely to prevent damage during transit
shipping.rule_3: Notify buyers immediately if an order will be delayed beyond the committed date
shipping.rule_4: Offer at least one standard domestic shipping option for all listings
shipping.rule_5: International shipping is optional but must comply with customs regulations

communication.title: Communication Standards
communication.subtitle: Professional, timely communication builds trust and drives repeat business.
communication.para1: All buyer communications must remain within the Pyonea platform. Directing buyers to external channels (phone, social media, third-party messaging apps) before an order is placed is a violation of our seller policy.
communication.para2: Messages should be polite and professional. Harassment, discriminatory language, or pressure tactics towards buyers will result in immediate account suspension.

documents.title: Required Documents
documents.subtitle: All documents must be valid, legible, and uploaded in JPEG, PNG, or PDF format (max 5MB each).
documents.doc_0_detail: Form 6 or equivalent from DICA / relevant authority
documents.doc_1_detail: Clear copy of both sides of the National Registration Card
documents.doc_2_detail: Bank statement or passbook showing your account name and number
documents.doc_3_detail: Issued by the Internal Revenue Department
documents.doc_4_detail: Required for food, health, pharmaceutical or regulated products
documents.doc_5_detail: Required if selling imported goods or exporting from Myanmar

prohibited.title: Prohibited Items
prohibited.subtitle: Listing any of the following will result in immediate removal and may lead to permanent account termination.
prohibited.footnote: This list is not exhaustive. Pyonea may remove any listing deemed harmful, illegal, or inconsistent with our community standards.
prohibited.item_0_detail: Any item infringing on trademarks, patents, or copyrights
prohibited.item_2_detail: Firearms, ammunition, knives intended as weapons, explosives
prohibited.item_3_detail: Any item obtained through illegal means
prohibited.item_4_detail: Chemicals that pose health or environmental risks without proper licensing
prohibited.item_5_detail: Pornographic materials or age-restricted products without proper verification
prohibited.item_6_detail: Products from endangered species or banned under CITES
prohibited.item_7_detail: Devices primarily designed for gambling purposes

performance.title: Performance Standards
performance.subtitle: Pyonea monitors seller performance monthly. Staying above these thresholds keeps your store in good standing.
performance.metric_0_description: Orders shipped within the committed timeframe
performance.metric_1_description: Orders delivered by the estimated delivery date
performance.metric_2_description: Buyer messages replied to within 24 hours
performance.metric_4_description: Orders resulting in a dispute or return
performance.consequence_0: First breach → Warning notification + 30-day improvement window
performance.consequence_1: Second breach (within 90 days) → Temporary listing suspension (7 days)
performance.consequence_2: Third breach (within 90 days) → Account review; potential permanent removal

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q_0: How long does seller verification take?
faqs.a_0: After submitting all required documents, verification typically takes 2–5 business days. You'll receive an email notification once your account is approved or if additional information is needed.
faqs.q_1: Can I sell as an individual without a registered business?
faqs.a_1: Currently Pyonea requires at least a sole proprietorship registration. We're working on an individual seller program — sign up for updates on our pricing page.
faqs.q_2: What happens if my performance metrics drop below the minimums?
faqs.a_2: You'll first receive a warning notification with a 30-day improvement window. If metrics remain below threshold, your account may be temporarily suspended pending review. Repeated violations can result in permanent removal.
faqs.q_3: Are there any upfront fees to join Pyonea?
faqs.a_3: No. The Basic plan is completely free. Commission fees are only charged when you complete a sale. Paid plans unlock lower commission rates and more product listings.
faqs.q_4: Can I list products in both English and Myanmar language?
faqs.a_4: Yes — and we strongly encourage it. Listings with both English and Myanmar content rank higher in search results and reach more buyers.
faqs.q_5: What image format and resolution is required for product photos?
faqs.a_5: JPEG or PNG, minimum 800×800px, maximum 5MB per image. Up to 8 images per product. The primary image should have a white or neutral background.

seo.description: Frequently asked questions about buying, selling, payments, shipping, and accounts on Pyonea, Myanmar's B2B wholesale marketplace.

hero.label: Help Center
hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.desc: Quick answers about how Pyonea works as a B2B marketplace: verified sellers, MOQ and wholesale pricing, RFQs, payments, delivery, and account help.

sidebar.need_help_desc: Our support team is available Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm.

list.no_questions_sub: Try a different search term or browse a category.
list.question: question

general.a_0: Pyonea is Myanmar's B2B wholesale marketplace connecting verified sellers with business buyers. We enable bulk purchasing, Request for Quotation (RFQ), and direct seller-to-buyer communication — all in one platform.
general.a_1: Pyonea is open to registered businesses in Myanmar. Buyers (retailers, resellers, businesses) can browse and purchase freely. Sellers must complete a verification process before listing products.
general.a_2: Browsing and buying on Pyonea is completely free. Sellers can list up to 20 products at no cost on the Basic plan. Paid plans offer lower commission rates and higher listing limits. See our Pricing page for details.
general.a_3: Pyonea supports English and Myanmar (Burmese). You can switch languages at any time using the language selector in the header. Sellers are encouraged to list products in both languages for maximum reach.
general.q_4: How do I contact Pyonea support?
general.a_4: You can reach our support team via the Contact page, by email at contact@pyonea.com, or by phone at +95 979 211 5547. Support is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM (Myanmar Standard Time).

buying.q_0: Do I need an account to browse products?
buying.a_0: No. You can browse all products and seller profiles without an account. However, you'll need to register to place orders, submit RFQs, or contact sellers.
buying.q_1: What is a Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)?
buying.a_1: MOQ is the smallest quantity a seller is willing to sell in a single order. Each product listing shows its MOQ. If you need a quantity below the listed MOQ, you can contact the seller directly to negotiate.
buying.a_2: RFQ stands for Request for Quotation. It allows you to request a custom price from one or more sellers for a specific product and quantity. Sellers respond with a quote, and you can accept, negotiate, or decline.
buying.q_3: Can I compare products from different sellers?
buying.a_3: Yes. Use the Product Comparison tool to compare up to four products side by side — including pricing, specifications, MOQ, and seller ratings.
buying.q_4: How do I track my order?
buying.a_4: Once your order is shipped, you'll receive a tracking number by email and in your buyer dashboard. You can also use the Track Your Order page with your order ID.
buying.q_5: Can I cancel or modify an order after placing it?
buying.a_5: You can request a cancellation before the seller ships the order. Once shipped, cancellations are subject to the seller's return policy. Contact the seller through the order page as soon as possible.

selling.q_0: How do I become a seller on Pyonea?
selling.a_0: Click 'Become a Seller' and complete the registration form. You'll need to provide your business registration certificate, owner NRC, bank account proof, and TIN. Verification typically takes 2–5 business days.
selling.q_1: What types of businesses can sell on Pyonea?
selling.a_1: Any Myanmar-registered business — including LLCs, sole proprietorships, and partnerships — can apply to sell. Individual sellers without business registration are not currently supported, though an individual seller program is in development.
selling.q_2: How many products can I list?
selling.a_2: The Basic plan (free) allows up to 20 active product listings. The Professional plan (50,000 MMK/month) allows up to 100 listings. The Enterprise plan (150,000 MMK/month) offers unlimited listings.
selling.q_3: Are there prohibited products on Pyonea?
selling.a_3: Yes. Counterfeit goods, controlled substances, weapons, stolen property, hazardous chemicals, adult content, wildlife products, and gambling equipment are prohibited. See the Seller Guidelines for the full list.
selling.q_4: How do I handle a buyer dispute?
selling.a_4: When a dispute is raised, you'll receive a notification and have 48 hours to respond via the platform. Pyonea's support team will mediate if an agreement cannot be reached. Prompt, professional responses are important for your seller rating.
selling.q_5: What performance standards must I maintain?
selling.a_5: Sellers must maintain: ≥95% order fulfillment rate, ≥90% on-time delivery, ≥85% response rate, ≥3.5 star average rating, and ≤5% return/dispute rate. Falling below thresholds triggers warnings and may lead to suspension.

payments.a_0: Pyonea accepts major Myanmar payment methods including KBZ Pay, Wave Money, AYA Pay, and bank transfer. Credit/debit card payments are available for select buyers. Payment options may vary by seller.
payments.q_1: When do sellers receive their payouts?
payments.a_1: Seller payouts are processed every Monday for the previous week's completed orders, minus commission fees and any outstanding dispute holds. Payments are sent directly to your registered bank account.
payments.a_2: Commission is a percentage of the final transaction value excluding shipping costs. Rates are 5% (Basic), 3% (Professional), and 1% (Enterprise). Commission is only charged on completed, confirmed transactions.
payments.q_3: Is it safe to pay on Pyonea?
payments.a_3: Yes. Pyonea uses secure payment processing and does not store your full payment details. Transactions are protected and funds are held in escrow until the buyer confirms receipt of their order.
payments.q_4: What happens if my payment fails?
payments.a_4: If a payment fails, your order will not be confirmed and no charge will be made. You can retry with a different payment method from your cart. Contact support if the issue persists.

shipping.a_0: Shipping is handled by the individual seller. Each seller sets their own shipping rates, carriers, and handling time. Shipping options and costs are displayed on the product and checkout pages.
shipping.a_1: Delivery times vary by seller and destination. Most sellers ship within 3 business days. Estimated delivery dates are shown on each listing and in your order confirmation. Domestic deliveries typically take 2–7 business days.
shipping.a_2: International shipping is optional for sellers. If a seller offers international shipping, it will be listed as a shipping option at checkout. All international shipments must comply with Myanmar customs regulations.
shipping.q_3: What if my order arrives damaged?
shipping.a_3: Take photos of the damage immediately and report the issue through the order page within 48 hours of delivery. Pyonea will mediate with the seller to arrange a replacement or refund according to the return policy.
shipping.q_4: Can I get a tracking number for my order?
shipping.a_4: Yes. Sellers are required to provide a tracking number for all shipments valued above 50,000 MMK. Tracking information will appear in your order details once the seller ships.

account.q_0: How do I change my password?
account.a_0: Open Seller Center, go to Settings, then open the Security section. Use Change Password there (your current password is required). Personal details are saved under the Personal section at the top of the same page.
account.q_1: How do I update my email address?
account.a_1: Email changes require identity verification. Contact our support team at contact@pyonea.com with your account details and proof of identity to request an email update.
account.q_2: Can I have both a buyer and seller account?
account.a_2: Each account has a single role — buyer, seller, or admin. If you need to both buy and sell, you'll need to use separate accounts with different email addresses.
account.q_3: How do I delete my account?
account.a_3: To request account deletion, contact our support team. Note that accounts with pending orders or active disputes cannot be deleted until those are resolved. Seller accounts with transaction history may be retained for compliance purposes.
account.q_4: I forgot my password. What should I do?
account.a_4: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your registered email address. You'll receive a password reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

cta.title: Couldn't find what you're looking for?
cta.desc: Our support team is here to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you as quickly as possible.

seo.title: Shipping Information | Pyonea Myanmar B2B Marketplace
seo.description: Learn how shipping works on Pyonea, including delivery areas, estimated timelines, packaging standards, tracking, and support for lost or damaged orders.

hero.label: Shipping
hero.title: Shipping Information
hero.desc: Learn how orders are prepared, shipped, and tracked on Pyonea. This guide covers delivery areas, estimated timelines, packaging standards, and the steps to take if an order is delayed, lost, or damaged.

methods.title: Shipping Methods
methods.subtitle: Each seller chooses the shipping methods they can support. Available options are shown at checkout.
methods.standard_desc: A reliable option for most orders, delivered through trusted domestic logistics partners.
methods.standard_d1: Tracking number provided for orders over 50,000 MMK
methods.standard_d2: Cost is calculated by weight and destination at checkout
methods.express_desc: Faster delivery for time-sensitive orders, available in Yangon and selected major cities.
methods.express_d0: Same-day delivery available within Yangon for orders placed before 12 PM
methods.freight_desc: For large, heavy, or oversized orders that are not suitable for standard parcel delivery.
methods.freight_d0: Available for orders over 50 kg or oversized items
methods.freight_d1: Quote-based — contact the seller or Pyonea support
methods.freight_d2: Delivery time negotiated based on order size and location
methods.intl_desc: International shipping is optional for sellers. Check the product listing to confirm availability.
methods.intl_d0: Subject to Myanmar export regulations and destination customs
methods.intl_d1: Buyer is responsible for import duties and taxes
methods.intl_d2: Delivery times vary widely by destination country

zones.title: Delivery Areas & Estimated Times
zones.subtitle: Timelines are estimated business days after dispatch. Actual delivery may vary by courier, weather, and local conditions.
zones.footnote: * Business days are Monday to Saturday, excluding Myanmar public holidays. Orders placed after 3 PM are processed on the next business day.
zones.zone_4_areas: Kachin, Kayah, Kayin, Chin, Mon, Rakhine, Shan states

handling.title: Order Preparation Time
handling.subtitle: The time a seller needs to prepare, pack, and hand over your order after payment is confirmed.
handling.obligation: Sellers must hand over orders within the preparation time shown on their listing. If an order cannot be shipped on time, the seller must notify the buyer promptly. Repeated delays may affect seller performance ratings.

packaging.title: Packaging Standards
packaging.subtitle: These minimum standards help products arrive safely and professionally.
packaging.rule_0: Use a box or packaging material suitable for the product type and weight
packaging.rule_1: Fill empty space with padding (bubble wrap, foam, paper) to prevent movement
packaging.rule_2: Seal all seams and edges with strong packing tape
packaging.rule_3: Fragile items must be double-boxed with at least 5 cm of cushioning on all sides
packaging.rule_4: Label the outer package clearly with the recipient's name, address, and contact number
packaging.rule_5: Include a packing slip with the order details inside the package
packaging.buyer_note: If your order arrives with visibly damaged packaging, photograph it before opening and report it within 48 hours via the order page.

lost.title: Lost or Damaged Orders
lost.subtitle: Follow these steps if your order does not arrive, arrives damaged, or contains the wrong items.
lost.step_0_desc: Contact the seller via the order page within 7 days of the estimated delivery date.
lost.step_1_desc: The seller has 48 hours to check with the courier and provide an update.
lost.step_2_desc: If unresolved, raise a dispute and Pyonea's support team will mediate.
lost.step_3_desc: Eligible claims are resolved with a refund or replacement shipment within 5–7 business days.
lost.eligible_0: Order not delivered within 7 days after the estimated date
lost.eligible_1: Items arrived visibly damaged or broken
lost.not_eligible_0: Reported more than 7 days after estimated delivery
lost.not_eligible_2: Delays due to incorrect address provided by buyer

seller_resp.title: Seller Shipping Responsibilities
seller_resp.subtitle: To keep the marketplace reliable, sellers are expected to meet the following standards.
seller_resp.item_0: Hand over orders within the preparation time stated on the listing
seller_resp.item_1: Provide a valid tracking number for all orders over 50,000 MMK
seller_resp.item_2: Notify the buyer promptly if an order will be delayed
seller_resp.item_3: Package all items securely to prevent transit damage
seller_resp.item_4: Offer at least one standard domestic shipping option
seller_resp.item_5: Respond to buyer shipping queries within 24 hours
seller_resp.item_6: Respect the delivery estimates shown at checkout
seller_resp.item_7: Comply with all applicable courier and customs regulations

faq.title: Shipping FAQs
faq.q_0: Can I choose my own courier?
faq.a_0: Buyers cannot choose a specific courier — that is determined by the seller. If you have a strong preference, contact the seller before placing your order to discuss options.
faq.q_1: What if the seller hasn't shipped my order within the stated handling time?
faq.a_1: Contact the seller through the order page. If there is no response within 24 hours, you can raise a dispute and Pyonea support will assist.
faq.a_2: Basic coverage may be included through most courier partners. For high-value goods, check the listing or contact the seller to ask about additional insurance.
faq.q_3: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
faq.a_3: Address changes are only possible before the seller ships the order. Contact the seller immediately through the order page. Once shipped, the address cannot be changed.
faq.q_4: Why does my tracking number not show any updates?
faq.a_4: It can take up to 24 hours for a new tracking number to appear in the courier system. If there is no update after 48 hours, contact the seller to confirm the tracking number.
faq.q_5: Are public holidays counted in delivery estimates?
faq.a_5: No. All delivery time estimates are in business days (Monday–Saturday, excluding Myanmar public holidays). Orders placed on public holidays begin processing on the next business day.

cta.title: Need help with a shipment?
cta.desc: Pyonea support is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM Myanmar Standard Time.

helpCenter.title: Help Center | Pyonea
helpCenter.description: Find answers to common questions about buying, selling, payments, delivery, and account management on Pyonea — Myanmar's leading B2B marketplace.

place_order.question: How do I place an order?
place_order.answer: To place an order, browse our product catalog, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. You can choose from various payment methods including MMQR, mobile wallets, and bank transfer.

minimum_order.question: What is the minimum order quantity?
minimum_order.answer: Minimum order quantities vary by product and are set by individual sellers. You can find the MOQ listed on each product page.

track_order.question: How can I track my order?
track_order.answer: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email or SMS. You can track your order status in the "My Orders" section of your account.

become_seller.question: How do I become a seller?
become_seller.answer: Register for a seller account, complete your profile, and submit your business documents for verification. Once approved, you can start listing your products.

seller_fees.question: What are the seller fees?
seller_fees.answer: We charge a commission fee ranging from 5-10% depending on your subscription plan. There are no upfront fees to join the platform.

receive_payments.question: How do I receive payments?
receive_payments.answer: Payments are processed through our secure payment system and transferred to your registered bank account every week, minus our commission fees.

payment_methods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment_methods.answer: We accept MMQR payments, mobile wallets (KBZ Pay, Wave Money), bank transfers, and cash on delivery for certain products.

payment_security.question: Is my payment information secure?
payment_security.answer: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption and never store your full payment details on our servers.

refund_time.question: How long do refunds take to process?
refund_time.answer: Refunds are typically processed within 3-5 business days after approval, depending on your payment method.

policy.body: When a seller requests platform delivery, the admin manually quotes a fee based on distance, weight, and area. The fee is negotiated and agreed before dispatch — no fixed rate is enforced by the platform. Once the fee is received (via bank transfer or mobile payment), mark it as collected here with the reference number.

seo.description: Choose a seller plan that fits your business. Start free on Pyonea and upgrade as your store grows.

hero.title: Choose the right plan for your business
hero.subtitle: Start free and scale as you grow. Upgrade any time — cancel any time.

basic.description: For small businesses starting to sell

professional.description: For stores ready to grow sales

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a_setup: No. There are no setup or onboarding fees for any plan. If you choose a paid plan, you only pay the monthly subscription fee.
faq.a_change_plans: Yes. You can change your plan any time from the Subscription tab in your Seller Dashboard.
faq.q_payment: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a_payment: We accept KBZPay, Wave Money, CB Bank transfer, and MMQR. After transferring, enter your payment reference in the upgrade flow.
faq.a_contract: No. Paid plans are billed month to month, and you can stop any time.
faq.q_limit: What happens if I reach my product limit?
faq.a_limit: You will need to upgrade or remove existing products before adding new ones. Your current listings remain live.
faq.q_commission: Does the commission rate apply to every order?
faq.a_commission: Yes. Commission applies only to completed sales and is calculated on the product subtotal before delivery fees.
